methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $300M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 9 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Robotics & Manufacturing. Range: $300M - $10.0B.

private.name: Hadrian
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.6B

private.name: Nimble Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B

private.name: Foundation Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), post-money $3B+ (reported, raise in progress)

data.narrative:
Bright Machines, a Series C robotics and manufacturing automation company that has raised $300M+, is evaluated against a peer set of 9 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage companies comprising 1 public entity and 8 private firms. Key comparable companies include 1X Technologies ($10.0B Series B), Exotec ($2.0B Series D), Bedrock Robotics ($1.8B Series B), Dexterity ($1.6B Series B), and Hadrian ($1.6B Series C).

Two triangulation methods are applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $300M total raised as a base proxy and applies a 1.7x step-up multiplier typical for Series C advancement, implying a valuation of $510M. Peer-median analysis across the 9-company cohort yields a median valuation of $1.6B, with a range spanning $300M to $10.0B. The wide dispersion reflects heterogeneity in technical approach and market traction within the robotics sector.

Triangulated analysis across both methods supports a valuation range of $434M (low) to $1.8B (high), with a median of $1.1B. The gap between stage-progression and peer-median results reflects uncertainty around Bright Machines' relative standing within the cohort—specifically, whether its traction and risk profile align with lower-median peers like Dexterity or higher-performing ones like Exotec. Resolution of unit economics and customer concentration would narrow this range materially.
